children.text: The term “recipient” means a recipient of a grant or cooperative agreement under an applicable program.

The term “applicable program” excludes programs authorized by the Higher Education Act of 1965 [ et seq.] and assistance programs provided under the Act of (Public Law 874, 81st Congress), and the Act of (Public Law 815, 81st Congress).20 U.S.C. 100111September 30, 1950September 23, 1950See References in Text note below.1
